reviewQueue.detail: Missing structural group definitions: agents, agent_traits, agent_filters, agent_rules, scenarios, scenario_events, sim_runs, sim_agent_state.

topSchemaDecisions: Define canonical storage model for sim_agent_state snapshots (JSON envelope vs normalized child rows).
Decide whether scenario_events should be append-only event logs or mutable stateful records.
Decide trait/action namespace governance to avoid overlap with Enneagram and developmental intimacy layers.
